title: Understanding Federal Award Numbers — D-RED Four-PDF Series (Steiner)
content: Four-PDF series from the 2022-11-30 Monthly D-RED Seminar on federal award numbers, presented by Becca Steiner. (1) Understanding Federal Notices of Award: /TrainingPresentations/2022.11.30_Understanding Federal Notices of Award.pdf. (2) Understanding DoD Award Numbers: /TrainingPresentations/2022.11.30_Understanding DoD Award Numbers.pdf. (3) Understanding DoED Award Numbers: /TrainingPresentations/2022.11.30_Understanding DoED Award Numbers.pdf. (4) Understanding NASA Award Numbers: /TrainingPresentations/2022.11.30_Understanding NASA Award Numbers.pdf. Use this series to decode award numbers from these federal sponsors.
